phase1_baseline.synthesis_notes: All high-severity patches applied. 10 pre-existing frontend test failures (DataSources.tsx scrollIntoView). Medium-severity items deferred: B-CAMP-01, B-CREA-01, B-AUD-01, B-CAMP-02, B-PLAT-03, B-BUDG-01, B-BUDG-02.

platform_dashboard_user_requirement.user_statement: make sure thats vissible as well — referring to combined view dashboard
platform_dashboard_user_requirement.renders_blank_check: PASS — component has loading skeleton, error state, hasData guard, FP-PLAT-02 zero-row EmptyState, and full chart render path. No blank-render scenario identified in source.

filterbar_platform_toggles.evidence: DashboardLayout.tsx:217-224 — routePlatformOptions = COMBINED_PLATFORM_OPTIONS when resolveRoutePlatformScope('/dashboards/platforms') returns null. COMBINED_PLATFORM_OPTIONS = [{value:'meta_ads',label:'Meta Ads'},{value:'google_ads',label:'Google Ads'}].
filterbar_platform_toggles.caveat: YELLOW — platform toggles only rendered when hasLiveData=true (datasetSource === 'warehouse' || 'meta_direct'). In demo/dummy mode, availablePlatforms=[] so no toggles shown. Not a bug but a user-experience gap in demo mode.

platform_dashboard_user_requirement.fetch_evidence: DashboardLayout.tsx:234-248 — when routePlatformScope is null and filters.platforms.length>0 from stale scoped route, resets to []. Combined view fetches /api/metrics/combined/ with platforms=[] (backend interprets as all) or with platforms=[meta_ads,google_ads] if user explicitly selects both toggles.
platform_dashboard_user_requirement.rows_from_both_platforms: Cannot verify statically — depends on backend response shape. PlatformDashboard renders data.byPlatform rows without filtering by platform key, so all rows returned by the API are shown.
platform_dashboard_user_requirement.empty_state_evidence: PlatformDashboard.tsx:215-231 — FP-PLAT-02 applied: hasData && !isLoading && data.byPlatform.length===0 && data.byDevice.length===0 → DashboardState variant='empty'.

platform_color_legend.evidence: PlatformComparisonBars renders data.byPlatform rows. No platform-color legend code found in PlatformDashboard.tsx itself. Whether PlatformComparisonBars has a color legend for Meta vs Google Ads cannot be confirmed without reading that component — out of scope per C1C instructions (not listed in audit scope files). Flag for C2C to inspect frontend/src/components/PlatformComparisonBars.tsx.

routes.scope_reset_evidence: DashboardLayout.tsx:240-246 — else branch: when routePlatformScope is null and currentPlatforms.length > 0, calls setFilters({...filters, platforms:[]}). This fires on entry from any scoped route.
routes.endpoint_scope_evidence: Filters flow from useDashboardStore.filters → buildFilterQueryParams → /api/metrics/combined/. When platforms=[] backend treats as all platforms.

bugs_confirmed.title: KPI tiles hardcode 'Facebook spend' and 'Instagram spend'
bugs_confirmed.evidence: kpis useMemo at line 86: data.byPlatform.find(p => p.platform.toLowerCase() === 'facebook'); line 89: ...=== 'instagram'. When filters.platforms=['google_ads'], both fbRow and igRow are undefined and KPIs show '—'. Labels remain 'Facebook spend' / 'Instagram spend' regardless of selected platforms.

new_bugs.title: Platform toggles hidden in demo/dummy mode
new_bugs.description: DashboardLayout.tsx:1106 passes availablePlatforms={hasLiveData ? routePlatformOptions : []}. When datasetSource is 'demo' or 'fake', hasLiveData is false, so availablePlatforms=[] and FilterBar renders no platform toggles. Combined dashboard user cannot switch between Meta/Google in demo mode.
new_bugs.impact: Users on demo adapter cannot use platform toggles to filter combined view. Not a regression from synthesis — pre-existing design decision. Flag for C2C: consider whether demo mode should expose platform toggles (they would have no effect on the fixed demo data but user expectation is they should exist).

routes.empty_state_notes: Two empty-state branches exist (lines 336-365 and 367-400). B-CAMP-02 (duplicate guards) still open. Gap: when campaign.data is truthy but rows=[] and availability.status='available' (not 'empty'), neither branch fires and an empty table is rendered silently.

bugs_confirmed.title: Duplicate empty-state branches; gap for rows=[] with availability.status=available
bugs_confirmed.evidence: First guard: !hasCampaignData && !isInitialLoading (line 336). Second guard: !isInitialLoading && campaignAvailability?.status === 'empty' && rows.length===0 (line 367). Gap: if hasCampaignData=true (data object exists) but rows=[] and availability.status != 'empty', falls through to render with empty CampaignTable.

routes.empty_state_evidence: CreativeDashboard.tsx:50-51 — shouldShowEmptyState = creativeAvailability?.status === 'empty' || (!creative.data && creative.status !== 'loading'). Covers both availability-empty and no-data cases.

BudgetDashboard.tsx:52-54 — FP-BUDG-01 applied: shouldShowEmptyState = (budgetAvailability !== undefined && budgetAvailability.status !== 'available') || (!budget.data && budget.status !== 'loading'). Guards against undefined availability falsely triggering empty state.

AudienceDashboard.tsx:172-210 — FP-AUD-01 applied (present in source with comment). hasData && !isLoading && !data?.byAgeGender?.length && !data?.byGender?.length → DashboardState variant='empty'. B-AUD-01 marked APPLIED in source.

ParishMapDetail.tsx:118-132 — FP-MAP-01 applied (comment in source): parish.status !== 'loading' && !isLoading && parishRows.length === 0 → DashboardState variant='empty'. Error state at line 101-115.

routes.combined_endpoint_evidence: Grep of GoogleAnalyticsDashboardPage.tsx shows zero matches for 'useDashboardStore', 'combined', or 'metrics/combined'. Page uses only local state and fetchGoogleAnalyticsWebRows → dedicated web analytics endpoint.
Grep of SearchConsoleDashboardPage.tsx shows zero matches for 'useDashboardStore', 'combined', or 'metrics/combined'.

routes.empty_state_evidence: SavedDashboardPage.tsx:159-172 — loading state shows DashboardState variant='loading'. Error state shows DashboardState variant='error' with message. Successfully loaded dashboard delegates empty-state to the rendered child component (CampaignDashboard, CreativeDashboard, BudgetDashboard, or ParishMapDetail).

deferred_items_status.evidence: DashboardLayout.tsx:234-248 — scoped→unscoped transition handler present in source with comment 'B-PLAT-01'. When routePlatformScope is null and currentPlatforms.length > 0, resets to []. APPLIED.
PlatformDashboard.tsx:213-231 — FP-PLAT-02 comment present. hasData && !isLoading && data.byPlatform.length===0 && data.byDevice.length===0 guard renders DashboardState empty variant. APPLIED.
PlatformDashboard.tsx:86-91 — fbRow/igRow lookups still use hardcoded 'facebook'/'instagram' string matches. KPI labels still read 'Facebook spend' / 'Instagram spend'. NOT APPLIED.
deferred_items_status.recommendation: Cosmetic/UX deferred. Recommend C2C fix: replace fbRow/igRow with sorted top-2 from byPlatform by spend, labeled by platform name.

deferred_items_status.evidence: useDashboardStore.ts:1490-1526 — FP-CAMP-01 comment and implementation present. resolvePlatformFilters(filters) applied in getCampaignRowsForSelectedParish. platformFilters guard ANDed with channelFilters. APPLIED.
useDashboardStore.ts:1528-1574 — FP-CREA-01 comment and implementation present. resolvePlatformFilters(filters) applied in getCreativeRowsForSelectedParish. APPLIED.

call_sites_for_c2c_validation.usage: creativeRows — passed to CreativeTable and summary useMemo

deferred_items_status.evidence: useDashboardStore.ts:1576-1616 — FP-BUDG-02 comment and implementation present. resolvePlatformFilters(filters) applied in getBudgetRowsForSelectedParish. APPLIED.

call_sites_for_c2c_validation.usage: budgetRows — passed to BudgetPacingList and summaryCards useMemo

deferred_items_status.evidence: CampaignDashboard.tsx:336-400 — two nearly identical empty-state blocks. Gap: if campaign.data is truthy (hasCampaignData=true) but rows=[] and availability.status='available', renders empty CampaignTable silently.
deferred_items_status.recommendation: C2C should consolidate to single guard: !isInitialLoading && (campaign.data?.rows.length ?? 0) === 0, deriving emptyVariant from availability.

deferred_items_status.evidence: AudienceDashboard.tsx:192-210 — FP-AUD-01 applied with comment. Empty arrays guard present. APPLIED.
SavedDashboardPage.tsx:55-58 — FP-SAVED-01 applied with comment. normalizeFilters restores platforms field: Array.isArray(value.platforms) ? value.platforms.map(String) : fallback.platforms. APPLIED.
SavedDashboardPage.tsx:129-152 — FP-SAVED-02 applied with comments. seededRef prevents re-seeding on URL changes. Dep array intentionally omits location.search with eslint-disable comment. APPLIED.

BudgetDashboard.tsx:49-54 — FP-BUDG-01 applied with comment. shouldShowEmptyState = (budgetAvailability !== undefined && budgetAvailability.status !== 'available') || (!budget.data && budget.status !== 'loading'). Guards against undefined availability. APPLIED.

b_camp_01_b_crea_01_selectors.status: APPLIED — NOT open for C2C to fix
b_camp_01_b_crea_01_selectors.detail: Both getCampaignRowsForSelectedParish and getCreativeRowsForSelectedParish now include resolvePlatformFilters guard in useDashboardStore.ts. C2C should validate no regressions at call-sites listed in deferred_items_status.
b_camp_01_b_crea_01_selectors.test_gap: CampaignDashboard.layout.test.tsx does not contain a platform-filter regression test (grep found no 'platformFilters' or 'filters.platforms' references in test file). C2C should add: when filters.platforms=['meta_ads'] and rows include google_ads entries, getCampaignRowsForSelectedParish returns only meta rows.

b_plat_03.fix: Replace fbRow/igRow hardcoded lookups with sorted top-2 from byPlatform by spend.

b_camp_02.fix: Consolidate duplicate empty-state branches; add guard for rows=[] when availability.status='available'.

nb_plat_01_demo_mode_toggles.fix: Consider whether demo mode should expose platform toggles (they filter useDashboardStore rows but the fixed demo payload may not contain both platform types).

console_error_suspects.suspect: data.byPlatformDevice.map((row) => <tr key={`${row.platform}-${row.device}`}>): if byPlatformDevice contains duplicate platform+device combinations, React will emit duplicate key warnings.

eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on the seed effect dep array — may suppress a legitimate warning if location.search is inadvertently depended on. Not a console error but a suppressed lint warning.

summary_notes: All high-severity bugs from synthesis are APPLIED and verified in source. B-CAMP-01, B-CREA-01, B-BUDG-01, B-BUDG-02, B-AUD-01, B-SAVED-01, B-SAVED-02 are all APPLIED — not open. B-PLAT-01 (scoped→unscoped transition) APPLIED. B-PLAT-02 (empty byPlatform EmptyState) APPLIED. Remaining open items: B-PLAT-03 (cosmetic, low), B-CAMP-02 (medium — duplicate empty-state branches with gap). One new bug: NB-PLAT-01 (platform toggles hidden in demo mode, low). Web cluster (GA4 + Search Console) correctly isolated from /api/metrics/combined/. Combined dashboard (/dashboards/platforms) renders, has correct route, nav link visible, FilterBar platform toggles present in live mode, scoped→unscoped transition handled, zero-row EmptyState handled. User's 'make sure thats visible as well' requirement: SATISFIED for live mode; YELLOW note for demo mode (no toggles).
